title: F5 Named Best in Class for Bot Management in Aite-Novarica Matrix of Leading Bot Detection and Management Providers
text: SEATTLE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--F5 (NASDAQ: FFIV) today announced that Aite-Novarica Group, a financial services research and advisory firm, has ranked the company as a Best in Class provider of bot management solutions in their recently released Aite Matrix: Leading Bot Detection and Management Providers report. As a Best in Class vendor, F5's approach integrates bot and fraud detection capabilities to secure organizations from a breadth of automated attacks while reducing user friction and allowing

title: F5, Inc.: $300 Billion Cybersecurity Opportunity But Fairly Valued
text: F5 Networks is a legacy cybersecurity company, founded in 1996, that focuses on application performance and security. The company is poised to ride growth across three secular trends which include; increasing web traffic, cybersecurity, and the cloud.

title: F5 Networks Stock Has Failed To Outperform The S&P Despite Steady Revenue Growth
text: F5 Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) stock price rose just 20% from $131 at 2017 end to around $157 currently, primarily due to favorable changes in its sales.

title: F5 to Participate in Upcoming Financial Conferences
text: SEATTLE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) today announced that it will participate in two upcoming financial conferences: Piper Sandler Growth Frontiers Conference F5's presentation will be webcast live beginning at 12:00 p.m. ET on Tuesday, September 13, 2022. Interested attendees can access the live webcast via the Investor Relations section of f5.com or via this link. An archived version of the webcast will be available on F5's Investor Relations page.
